signals.headline: Iran Nuclear Talks Collapse with VP Vance; Trump Announces Strait of Hormuz Blockade | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Nuclear Talks Collapse with VP Vance; Trump Announces Strait of Hormuz Blockade | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Vice President **JD Vance**, leading U.S. negotiations in Islamabad, Pakistan, failed to secure an agreement with Iran over its nuclear program; Vance blamed Iran's refusal to abandon weapons, while Iran cited lack of U.S. trust-building.[3][5]
